meaning: n.鞋后根与鞋底中间的垫皮,边缘
examples: The Air Force quickly became the think tank's main contractor, and Rand began consulting on everything from propeller turbines to missile defense.
Rand Paul took the stage to hearty cheers.
Rand, on the other hand, was rhetorically shrewd.
Day trips start at 495 rand per person, including transport, bike rental and wine tastings.
Bascule offers whisky tastings, starting at 175 rand and priced according to the age of the whisky.
